name: building-react-native-apps
description: React Native implementation skills covering best practices and upgrade workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Best practices and upgrade guidance for React Native apps.
interface.longDescription: Includes React Native skills from callstackincubator/agent-skills and vercel-labs/agent-skills for implementation best practices, performance work, and version upgrades.
defaultPrompt: Review this React Native screen for architecture and performance issues.
Suggest better implementation patterns for a newly added React Native feature.
Plan the upgrade path for this app to a newer React Native version.
